name: decision-log
description: Capture a technical or product decision with chosen option, rejected alternatives, and rationale — in a format a future agent can read to reconstruct context.

interface.shortDescription: Capture a technical or product decision with chosen option, rejected alternatives, and rationale — in a format a future agent can read to reconstruct context.
interface.longDescription: Capture a technical or product decision with chosen option, rejected alternatives, and rationale — in a format a future agent can read to reconstruct context. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Log this decision: what we chose, what we rejected, and why. Save it in a format a future Claude session can read.
